name: MerhabaMap Source Discovery Engine v1 Fixed

parameters.query:
SELECT id, name, platform, source_kind, url, trust_score
FROM sources
WHERE is_active = true
  AND url IS NOT NULL
  AND lower(COALESCE(platform, 'website')) IN ('website', 'web')
ORDER BY trust_score DESC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 25;

INSERT INTO sources (
  id,
  name,
  platform,
  source_kind,
  url,
  is_active,
  is_public,
  trust_score,
  account_handle,
  external_id,
  discovery_method,
  notes,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
SELECT
  gen_random_uuid()::text,
  '{{ $json.candidate_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.candidate_platform }}',
  '{{ $json.candidate_source_kind }}',
  '{{ $json.candidate_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  true,
  true,
  {{ Number($json.candidate_trust_score || 50) }},
  NULL,
  NULL,
  '{{ $json.discovery_method }}',
  {{ $json.seed_source_name ? "'Discovered from: " + $json.seed_source_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM sources
  WHERE lower(url) = lower('{{ $json.candidate_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
)
RETURNING id, name, platform, source_kind, url, trust_score;

SELECT id, name, platform, source_kind, url, trust_score, discovery_method, created_at
FROM sources
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
